arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea eyeing 16-year-old Ajax wonder kid
arts.sum: Chelsea are seemingly covering all bases when it comes to transfers now, and are looking to the future if their interest in Ajax’s 16-year-old, Jorthy Mokio, is anything to go by.
